name: Flora Bar: Status

description.en: Change the Flora Bar online status. The website will show it immediately.
description.de: Flora Bar Status ändern. Wird sofort auf der Website angezeigt.
description.es: Change the Flora Bar online status. The website will show it immediately.
description.fr: Change the Flora Bar online status. The website will show it immediately.
description.ro: Change the Flora Bar online status. The website will show it immediately.
description.it: Change the Flora Bar online status. The website will show it immediately.

bot: Ask Paul or Cassia for the status. If closed, always ask for a reason (e.g. Privatveranstaltung, Feiertag, Krankheit). Then update.

description.en: Reason (required if closed, e.g. private event, holiday)
description.de: Grund (Pflicht bei geschlossen, z.B. Privatveranstaltung, Feiertag)
description.es: Reason (required if closed, e.g. private event, holiday)
description.fr: Reason (required if closed, e.g. private event, holiday)
description.ro: Reason (required if closed, e.g. private event, holiday)
description.it: Reason (required if closed, e.g. private event, holiday)
